label: Marketing-labeled but analytics-heavy hybrid probe
profileText: Marketing student targeting brand marketing roles. Does not want heavy analytics roles. Experience with campaign execution, Excel, Google Analytics, and Canva. Class of 2026.
jobText: Marketing Insights Coordinator role supporting SQL queries, Tableau dashboards, attribution analysis, KPI ownership, consumer research, and experiment design. Preferred tools include Excel, SQL, Tableau, and Google Analytics.
